title: Crop PDF Margins — Trim Pages Offline
h1: Crop and Trim PDF Page Margins Instantly
description: Remove unwanted whitespace or crop PDF pages to custom dimensions, all locally. Fast and completely secure.

sections.title: Why Crop PDFs Locally?
sections.content: Scanned documents often have large margins. Crop them locally without exposing internal document structure to the cloud.

steps.title: Open PDF
steps.description: Load the PDF you want to crop.

steps.title: Set Margins
steps.description: Drag guides or enter exact margin values.

sections.title: 100% Secure Local Processing
sections.content: All operations are performed directly on your local device. We use advanced WebAssembly technology to process your documents without ever uploading them to external servers, ensuring complete privacy.

sections.title: Technical Documents Stay Local
sections.content: Architectural plans and legal PDFs cropped locally without any server round-trip.

sections.title: Crop Any Size PDF Instantly
sections.content: Crop margins from a 200-page document in under 2 seconds. All in your browser.

faqs.q: Can I crop all pages uniformly?
faqs.a: Yes, apply the same crop to every page at once.
Yes, you can set per-page crop values.

faqs.q: What are the minimum margin values?
faqs.a: You can crop all the way to 0 margin on any side.
Only whitespace is removed by default; you control the guides.
